calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-27-2010 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-27-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Dept. 218, Commissioner: William Gargano; Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha; Not Reported.
Appearances:
Sean Joyce, Esq. for and with the Plaintiff Don McKernan.
Destiny Marshall, Esq., through limited scope, for and with the Defendant: Carla Rodriguez.
This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference.
The Judge Pro Tem Toni Young, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions in Dept. 304-B.
The parties enter into a signed agreement "Stipulation for Dismissal or Entry of Judgment", which was NOT filed.
Case settled, matter is taken off calendar.

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Jan-12-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. SEAN PATRICK JOYCE, TEL. NO. 399-1460 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
CARLA RODRIGUEZ, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER.

RULING - DEFENDANT CARLA RODRIGUEZ' MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT IS GIVEN LEAVE TO FILE AN ANSWER BY CLOSE OF BUSINESS DAY ON JANUARY 13, 2010. Mr. Joyce is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB
